context: Tests whether the RealityKit skill correctly handles iOS AR camera setup, runtime support, permission, and required-device capability tradeoffs.

checklist.name: Camera usage description
checklist.description: Requires NSCameraUsageDescription for camera-based AR and explains that ARKit/RealityKit camera access is privacy-gated.

checklist.name: Runtime support gate
checklist.description: Checks ARWorldTrackingConfiguration.isSupported or another relevant ARConfiguration.isSupported before presenting AR-only UI.

checklist.name: Unavailable fallback
checklist.description: Handles denied camera permission or unavailable AR with user-facing fallback UI instead of treating a black camera view as only a model-loading failure.

checklist.name: Required capability tradeoff
checklist.description: Explains that the arkit UIRequiredDeviceCapabilities value is appropriate only when AR is required for the whole app; otherwise runtime gating is preferred.

checklist.name: RealityViewCameraContent behavior
checklist.description: Mentions that RealityViewCameraContent uses an AR camera view by default on iOS and can fall back to non-AR mode when AR or camera access is unavailable.
